ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the movie was released */,
  "director" TEXT /* Director(s) of the movie */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre(s) of the movie */,
  "cast" TEXT /* Main cast of the movie */,
  "synopsis" TEXT /* Brief synopsis of the movie */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Duration of the movie in minutes */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget of the movie */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated by the movie */,
  "production_company" TEXT /* Name of the production company */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the movie was released */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL to the movie's trailer */,
  "poster_url" TEXT /* URL to the movie's poster */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., regular, moderator, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being reviewed */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the review was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the review was last updated */,
  "spoiler_flag" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the review contains spoilers */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the review is featured */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the review is deleted */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Date and time of the last activity on the review (e.g., update, comment) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiments" (
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment record */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review being analyzed */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score (e.g., -1 to 1) */,
  "sentiment_label" TEXT /* Sentiment label (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the sentiment analysis */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date and time the sentiment analysis was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentiments_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "keywords" (
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each keyword record */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review from which the keyword was extracted */,
  "keyword" TEXT /* Keyword extracted from the review */,
  "frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of the keyword in the review */,
  "context" TEXT /* Context in which the keyword appears (e.g., positive, negative) */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score associated with the keyword */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("keyword_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_keywords_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating record */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review being rated */,
  "rating_type" TEXT /* Type of rating (e.g., overall, acting, plot) */,
  "rating_value" INTEGER /* Value of the rating (1-5) */,
  "rating_weight" REAL /* Weight of the rating (e.g., for weighted averages) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date and time the rating was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_ratings_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "preference_name" TEXT /* Name of the preference (e.g., email_notifications, preferred_genres) */,
  "preference_value" TEXT /* Value of the preference */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* User's timezone */,
  "language" TEXT /* User's preferred language */,
  "notification_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of notifications (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "director_name" TEXT /* Name of the director */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the director */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the director */,
  "place_of_birth" TEXT /* Place of birth of the director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_cast" (
  "cast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cast member */,
  "cast_name" TEXT /* Name of the cast member */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character played by the cast member */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the cast member */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the cast member */,
  "place_of_birth" TEXT /* Place of birth of the cast member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cast_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review being voted on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user casting the vote */,
  "vote_type" TEXT /* Type of vote (e.g., upvote, downvote) */,
  "vote_weight" REAL /* Weight of the vote (e.g., for weighted averages) */,
  "vote_date" TEXT /* Date and time the vote was cast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_votes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_votes_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was created */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the comment is deleted */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Date and time of the last activity on the comment (e.g., update, reply) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_comments_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user profile */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "joined_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user joined the platform */,
  "twitter_handle" TEXT /* User's Twitter handle */,
  "instagram_handle" TEXT /* User's Instagram handle */,
  "favorite_movies" TEXT /* List of favorite movies */,
  "favorite_directors" TEXT /* List of favorite directors */,
  "favorite_actors" TEXT /* List of favorite actors */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_profiles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_keywords" (
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each keyword record */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "keyword" TEXT /* Keyword associated with the movie */,
  "frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of the keyword in the movie's reviews */,
  "context" TEXT /* Context in which the keyword appears (e.g., positive, negative) */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score associated with the keyword */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("keyword_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_keywords_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gave the rating */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being rated */,
  "rating_value" INTEGER /* Value of the rating (1-5) */,
  "rated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the rating was given */,
  "rating_weight" REAL /* Weight of the rating (e.g., for weighted averages) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date and time the rating was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_ratings_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)
